## Tags
salad, lettuce, vegetable, chard, cabbage, bok choy

## Categories
food-beverage, emoji, sustainability

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/leafy-green)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::LeafyGreen;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        LeafyGreen { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
